compiled_state.title: UPDATE: add dependency pre-scan as Phase 1 Step 0 in onboarding SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Story
4c55-0c7a

## testing_mode
UPDATE

## What
Add `### Step 0: Dependency Pre-Scan` as first step inside `## Phase 1: Auto-Detection` in plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md. Runs before Step 1 (Read Project Files) and any user interaction.

## Required deps check
- bash >= 4.0 via /bin/bash --version (NOT PATH bash — catches macOS default bash 3)
- GNU coreutils via date --version or gdate --version
- git via command -v git

## If required deps missing
- Collect all into one list
- Present single brew install ... command
- Pause for user confirmation
- If Homebrew unavailable: explicit out-of-scope message, do NOT attempt install

## Optional deps
- ast-grep (sg) and semgrep: check command -v
- Offer (never require) with timeout (~30s) to avoid hanging on restricted networks
- Never block progress

## Phase counter
- Dep check inherits Phase 1 counter entry (no PHASE_PLAN modification needed — Step 0 is part of Phase 1)
- Display format: (Phase N of Y) per b267-a3b9

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md — add ### Step 0 as first step under ## Phase 1: Auto-Detection

## Acceptance Criteria
- Step 0 checks bash >= 4.0 via /bin/bash --version, GNU coreutils, git before any questions
- Missing required deps: single brew install presented, pauses for confirmation
- Optional deps offered separately, never block, timeout applied
- test_dependency_check_section_present (9f37-05ce) passes GREEN
